name: USCGC Duane (WPG 33)
events: 17 Apr 1943 Duane assisted USCGC Spencer in sinking U-175 near Convoy HX-233. After the U-boat sank, Duane recovered 22 survivors. (1)
29 Apr 1943 HMS Untamed (Lt. G.M. Noll, RN) conducted exercises off Lough Foyle with USCGC Duane (Capt. H.G. Bradbury, USCG) and HMS Keppel (Cdr. M.J. Evans, OBE, RN). (2)
